summary: Backend (9/9 pytest) + frontend (all UI assertions) green for: (1) Categories CRUD + subcategories endpoints with auth, slug uniqueness, auto-slugify; (2) Footer 4-column redesign with working inquiry form; (3) Homepage no longer renders 'Industries We Serve' and categories are now DB-backed; (4) Admin Categories module create/edit/delete + subcategory chips; (5) Admin Products category & subcategory dropdowns populated dynamically from /api/categories.

minor.issue: _slugify() strips underscores entirely instead of converting them to hyphens. Input 'TEST_Diamond Tools' yields slug 'testdiamond-tools' rather than 'test-diamond-tools'. Regex r"[^a-z0-9\s-]" should include '_' in allowed set OR replace '_' with space/hyphen before the strip step. Not blocking — most user category names won't have underscores.

action_items: (Optional, minor) Fix _slugify in /app/backend/server.py to convert underscores to hyphens (e.g., normalize '_' to '-' or include '_' before the [\s_]+ collapse step).
(Carry-over from iter 2) Split server.py (~1150 lines) into modules; remove '*' from CORS allow_origins when allow_credentials=True.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend slugify regex bug strips underscores — see action items.

DELETE /api/categories/{id} does not cascade to products referencing that slug; products keep an orphan category string. Consider preventing delete when products exist, or null/reassign products. Not in spec but worth noting.

POST /api/categories/{id}/subcategories does not guard against duplicate sub_slug within the same category — pushing 'Sub Alpha' twice yields two entries with slug 'sub-alpha'. Add a $not check or use $addToSet semantics.
PUT /api/categories/{id} slug uniqueness check uses {'$ne': ObjectId(category_id)} but is missing a try/except — passing a non-ObjectId id will raise InvalidId 500 instead of 404.
Footer query-form uses native browser required validation (required attr) AND a JS toast guard — both fine; consider also validating phone format (just notice).
server.py is now ~1150 lines — splitting recommended (auth, products, categories, settings/uploads, video, dealers/inquiries).
AdminCategories.js subcategory chip key uses slug only; if two subcats coincidentally share slug (due to backend not guarding), React will warn about duplicate keys.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (homepage industries removal, footer 4-col + form submit + clear + map iframe + 6 socials + no app store, admin nav + categories CRUD + auto-slugify + subcat chips + edit prefilled + delete, admin product dynamic category/subcategory dropdowns all verified)

test_credentials: admin@mayur.com / MayurAdmin@2024 (from /app/memory/test_credentials.md, also seeded on every backend startup)
seed_data_creation: Backend tests create + delete one transient category per run (slug 'testdiamond-tools-<epoch>'). Footer-form tests create 2 inquiries per run (TEST_Footer prefixed). UI test creates+deletes 'pw-test-cat' category. No leftover test categories after this run (verified via UI).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Categories endpoint shape: {id (ObjectId str), name, slug, description, image_url, subcategories:[{name,slug}], sort_order, created_at}. 6 categories seeded on first boot via startup_event when categories collection is empty (cutting-wheels, grinding-wheels, flap-discs, saw-blades, non-woven-wheels, buffing-polishing). Admin tests use Bearer token from POST /api/auth/login. Footer form submits to POST /api/inquiries with inquiry_type='general', email optional. Admin Categories page at /admin/categories; data-testids: admin-categories, add-category-btn, category-card-{slug}, edit-category-{slug}, delete-category-{slug}, category-name-input (auto-slugifies via React onChange), category-slug-input, category-image-input, category-sort-input, category-description-input, subcategory-input, add-subcategory-btn, form-subcat-{slug}, remove-subcat-{slug}, save-category-btn. AdminProducts: product-category-select populated from /api/categories slugs; product-subcategory-select renders only when chosen category has subcategories.
tested_features: GET /api/categories returns 6 seeded categories with required keys and subcategory arrays
POST/PUT/DELETE /api/categories require admin auth (401/403 when unauthenticated)
POST /api/categories auto-slugifies from name, 400 on duplicate slug
PUT /api/categories/{id} updates name/slug/sort_order, 400 on duplicate slug
POST /api/inquiries accepts payload with and without email (footer form path)
Homepage: 'Industries We Serve' text is completely absent from DOM
Homepage Categories section renders 6 dynamic categories from /api/categories
Footer: 4 columns (footer-contact-info, footer-map iframe with google maps, footer-query-form, footer-follow-us)
Footer: NO App Store / Play Store / Download App references anywhere in footer markup
Footer: 6 social icons (Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn, YouTube, Twitter/X, WhatsApp)
Footer form: submit posts to /api/inquiries, shows success toast, clears all 4 fields
Admin sidebar: admin-nav-categories present and routes to /admin/categories

Admin Categories: 6 seeded cards visible, Add Category opens modal, auto-slugifies on name typing, subcategory chip add via button, save persists and lists new card, edit reopens modal pre-filled, delete with confirm removes card
Admin Products Add modal: product-category-select populated with all 6 dynamic slugs; selecting saw-blades reveals product-subcategory-select with tct/diamond/marble-granite
